title.en: The Lord of Xuanyin said angrily.

content.en:
"Lord of the Shadows, you must declare war on the Dragon River!"

The Lord of Xuanyin said angrily.

"That's for sure!" the Lord of the Shadows nodded.

Subsequently.

They decided to have the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the other branches gather back, lest the other branches would also be affected.

Soon, one Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor returned to the Shadow Ruins Headquarters from all over the Shadow Ruins, and the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the entire Shadow Ruins were summoned, and under the leadership of the three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, they directly attacked and killed a treasure land in the Dragon River.

With almost no chance of negotiation, Shadow Ruins and Dragon River fought again.

The three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins and the three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River fought.

Just a fight.

The Lord of Shadows and the Lord of Ju Babies scolded each other directly.

"Lord of the Shadows, you are so shameless, directly attacking our Dragon River's treasure land and killing our Dragon River's Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor!" the Lord of Ju Babies roared angrily.

And this scene, in the eyes of the Lord of the Shadow, is completely reversed.

Immediately, the Lord of the Shadow Universe roared angrily: "Lord of the Infants, it is you who are truly shameless, we have signed an agreement, and as a result, you directly destroyed the eastern branch of our Shadow Ruins, and hundreds of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors have been killed by you, and you still say that I am shameless?"

"You slander me!"

At the same time, the Lord of Ju Ying was confused, but he also thought that the Lord of Shadow was planting and slandering him.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides fought together, and there was no way to make sense at all.

......

"Dragon River and the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins have all fought, and now there should only be a few Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the Shadow Ruins Headquarters, and the magic circle has been opened, and they will definitely not be able to stop me!"

Thereupon.

He still went to the Shadow Ruins headquarters in the copy of the Infant Lord.

Soon.

He came to the Shadow Ruins Headquarters and saw that the Shadow Ruins Headquarters had opened one after another magic circles, all of which were magic circles opened by the Origin Upper Realm, and they could not be broken at all without the strength of the Origin Upper Realm.

Moreover, it can't be broken in an instant, and it will take a little time.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used the top other side supreme technique, the other side slashing technique, to attack the magic circle.

Click!

A circle cracked, but it didn't break.

At this time.

The will of the Lord of Qi He, who was in charge of guarding the town at the headquarters of the Shadow Ruins, reached outside and saw the Lord of Ju Ying, and his face suddenly changed drastically.

So, he immediately passed the information to the Lord of the Shadows.

......

On the other side, the Lord of the Shadows, who was fighting with the Lord of the Infants, received a summons from the Lord of the Chime.

"The Lord of Shadows, the Lord of Ju Babies is attacking us outside our Shadow Ruins!"

Hearing this information, the Lord of the Shadows was stunned.

Isn't the Lord of the Babies fighting him, how can he invade the Shadow Ruins Headquarters?

The first thing that came to his mind was not that someone was pretending to be the Lord of the Infants, but that there was another possibility.

"Doppelganger!"

It is very difficult for the Origin Upper Realm to condense a clone.

However, it is not without hope.

If you obtain some incomparably rare treasures, you still have the hope of refining a clone with strength comparable to that of the Origin Upper Realm.

Perhaps, the Lord of Ju Babies has such a treasure and has refined a clone.

"Lord of Ju Infants, no wonder you dare to invade our Shadow Ruins Headquarters, it turns out that you have obtained a clone, which is equivalent to your Dragon River having four Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, thinking that your strength will crush our Shadow Ruins, so you will invade us!!!"

The Lord of the Shadows was furious.

And the Lord of Ju Babies is very confused, what doppelganger?

He didn't understand it at all!

The Lord of the Shadows didn't say much, and when he saw that the Lord of the Shadows didn't say anything, he thought his guess was right.

"The doppelganger of the Lord of Xuanyin, the Lord of Taihe, and the Lord of Ju Ying has invaded our headquarters, and we must return!"

The Lord of the Shadow Circle summoned the Lord of Xuanyin and the Lord of Taihe.

"Good!"

The Lord of Xuanyin and the Lord of Taihe knew about it, so they prepared to retreat.

But they wanted to retreat, and Long He, who had been invaded and suffered a lot of losses, naturally didn't want to let them go.

This made it impossible for them to quickly withdraw to the Shadow Ruins headquarters, and they became more and more anxious, and there were many flaws in the battle.

......

Shadow Ruins Headquarters.

Ye Tian broke one magic circle after another.

Gradually, one after another, the magic circles were broken, and some of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were maintaining the magic circles were also directly shattered and died.

"The Lord of the Shadow Treasure hasn't come back yet, our Shadow Ruins Headquarters is finished!"

The Lord of Chime is desperate.

Rumble!

The last layer of the circle was torn apart.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian came in.

Puff puff puff!!!

One Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian's casual bombardment, and even the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor couldn't stop a finger.

The Lord of Chime wanted to escape, but was also instantly killed by the other side of the slashing technique.

In a short time, the entire Origin Realm of the Shadow Ruins Headquarters was completely killed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to collect the resources of the Shadow Ruins Headquarters, especially the resources in the core treasure house, and he took them all.

There is also the Blood Cave Demon Vine, this thing can't be kept, otherwise the Shadow Ruins will invade the eastern part of the Eternal Beyond Land in the future and hunt down those Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to attack the Blood Cave Demon Vine.

Rumble!!!!

The rattans of the Blood Cave Demon Vine were resisting, but there was no point.

It can't even beat the ordinary Origin Upper Realm, where can it beat Ye Tian!

"Kill!"

One after another, the light of the Beyond Slashing Technique pierced through its vines, piercing its body.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian found that the Blood Cave Demon Vine had bred a blood-colored vine liquid in its body, which seemed to be a good thing.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian quickly slashed the Blood Cave Demon Vine and took away the Blood Cave Demon Vine Liquid in his body, even the root system of the Vine Liquid, leaving nothing behind.

Soon, the Blood Cave Demon Vine completely withered, and was directly smashed by Ye Tian, leaving no trace.

At this point, the Blood Cave Demon Vine disappeared again.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left here.

This time, he had killed so many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the Shadow Ruins, destroyed their headquarters, taken away the treasure treasury resources, and destroyed the Blood Cave Demon Vine, which was already a fierce revenge.

As for killing the Lord of the Shadows, their strength is still a little worse.

His true body copy body is definitely stronger than the Lord of the Shadows, but he is in the Shadow Ruins, his strength is suppressed, and it is a little difficult to kill the three of them.

Wait for him to improve a bit, and then kill them.

Soon after.

The Shadow Lords have returned, and they are furious when they see the breached Shadow Ruins headquarters.

Moreover, the treasure house was looted, the blood cave demon vine was destroyed, and the hard work of the shadow ruins was destroyed.

As a result, the remaining Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins went crazy, and in the long years to come, they continued to assassinate and attack the Dragon River, making the Dragon River miserable.

The point is, they didn't do it!

The Lord of Ju Babies even came out to explain, but it was useless, and Shadow Ruins didn't believe it!
